title: Private Stress Lab Run Pack v5.2
previousPackage: Private Evidence Stress Test Lab Pack v5.1
recommendedDecision: Use v5.2 to run the first private fake/sample stress-lab session. Do not treat the run pack as evidence that P0 controls have passed; it prepares the private run, owner roster, evidence custody, sample tests, provider boundaries, public lines, and go/no-go register.
runRule: Use v5.2 to run the first private fake/sample stress-lab session for Barayamal and First Nations Toastmasters without touching real intake, official Toastmasters records, provider real-record access, outbound email, or live Decidim access.
evidenceRule: Private run evidence must stay outside the public package; public pages may show only fake/sample status, aggregate counts, approved public-safe lines, and learning summaries.
authorityRule: Dean Foley / Barayamal may advise, build, and review, but cannot replace owner approval for authority, privacy, IDS/data governance, official Toastmasters boundary, support, access, security, provider scope, rollback, communications, or launch.
decisionRule: No limited private pilot or provider handoff can proceed until every P0 stress run has a private owner decision, evidence custody record, rollback route, and public-safe status line.

sourceAnchors.label: v4.8 Pilot Decision and Build Handoff Room
v4.9 Private Owner Decision Meeting Pack
v5.0 Private Decision Execution Control Pack
v5.1 Private Evidence Stress Test Lab Pack

priorStressLab.recommendedDecision: Use v5.1 to stress-test the v5.0 execution controls before any live pilot, real intake, provider access to real records, outbound email, or live Decidim access. Keep all drills fake/sample-only and require private owner acceptance for every P0 stress scenario.

sessionSteps.blocker: No private run until owner roster is named

sessionSteps.output: Private evidence folder and retention rule

sessionSteps.step: Run privacy and data P0 tests
sessionSteps.blocker: Real data or outbound email touched

sessionSteps.output: Support and official Toastmasters boundary decisions
sessionSteps.blocker: Official records or member services implied

sessionSteps.step: Run security and evidence custody tests
Run First Nations Toastmasters controlled sample

p0Runs.privateEvidenceNeeded: Private proof that critical authority route missing is blocked, contained, and reversible using fake/sample data only.
p0Runs.runAction: Inject the critical authority route missing failure with fake/sample records and require owner decision.

p0Runs.publicSafeLine: Private preparation is continuing with fake/sample data only.

providerTests.test: Provider asks for real participant records
providerTests.providerPrompt: Can you send the real intake spreadsheet?

providerTests.test: Provider asks for official Toastmasters member list
providerTests.providerPrompt: Can we import current member data?
providerTests.requiredResponse: Reject; state official records are out of scope.

providerTests.test: Provider asks to enable outbound email
providerTests.providerPrompt: Can we turn on email invitations?
providerTests.requiredResponse: Reject until private privacy evidence passes.
Reject; use least-privilege temporary access only after approval.

providerTests.test: Provider requests logs with private evidence

providerTests.requiredResponse: Require restore proof before next step.

providerTests.test: Provider asks to invite real users
Provider asks for public launch wording
providerTests.providerPrompt: Can we say launch is coming?

commsApprovals.approvedLine: The public demo is a fake/sample preparation tool; no live pilot has been approved.
Barayamal is being used as a controlled sample pathway with fake/sample records only.
First Nations Toastmasters workflows are represented only as fake guest/member-boundary samples.
commsApprovals.blockedLine: Official Toastmasters members are being onboarded.

commsApprovals.approvedLine: Provider or self-build options remain under fake/sample-only review.
commsApprovals.blockedLine: A provider has access to records.

commsApprovals.approvedLine: Private stress testing is being prepared before any live step.
commsApprovals.reason: Do not claim private evidence outcome

commsApprovals.approvedLine: Privacy and consent controls remain under private review.
Authority gates remain private and unresolved until owner evidence is accepted.
The project may hold, repeat, or archive based on private owner decisions.
No live Decidim access is approved by this public demo.
Private evidence is not published in the public package.

decisions.nextAction: Only consider after all P0 passes

decisions.minimumEvidence: Any P0 hold or unclear owner evidence
Repeated P0 failure or authority cannot be proven
Local build path and access controls defined
Email remains disabled or safely captured
Access, backup, revoke, logs, and privacy pass
